arts.ttl: LaLiga chief: Reported Man City for breaking rules
arts.sum: LaLiga president Javier Tebas has revealed that he reported Manchester City to the European commission for allegedly manipulating their balance sheets.

arts.ttl: La Liga boss Javier Tebas accuses Man City of financial deception 'similar to Enron'
arts.sum: Enron executives were found to have generated false profits to hide the company's true debt

arts.ttl: “The truth is…” – Player explains reason for leaving Manchester City despite ‘perfect’ spell
arts.sum: Last summer, Julián Alvarez joined Atlético Madrid after spending two years at Manchester City. The Argentina international won the treble in his first season at Manchester City and the FIFA Club World Cup and Premier League title last season. arts.ttl: Julian Alvarez: Champions League final frustration powered Man City exit
arts.sum: Julian Alvarez has fitted in perfectly at Atletico Madrid following his summer move from Manchester City. The Argentina international set out his intention to leave Manchester following Argentina’s 2024 Copa America final win. arts.ttl: Man City hero fires warning to Man Utd - but his coach's reaction told a different story
arts.sum: Manchester City booked a third-successive FA Youth Cup semi-final place with a big win at West Brom as their hopes of a double live on.

arts.ttl: Echeverri spoke to 'legend' Aguero about joining Man City
arts.sum: Argentina U20s midfielder Claudio Echeverri says he spoke with former Manchester City striker Sergio Aguero before agreeing to join the Premier League club.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola hit nail on the head with comments on Frank Lampard's ability to manage
arts.sum: Frank Lampard has enjoyed a sensational start to life as Coventry City manager and one person who would not be surprised by his success is Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola

arts.ttl: Man City might only be three signings away from their dream XI
arts.sum: Manchester City have started to look more youthful in recent fixtures and a couple of big additons in the summer could at least give them a young starting XI.
